scope: post-merge quality debt accumulated through PR #135

quality_debts.summary: Malformed-hash invalid Builder to Responsive fixture contradicted its fail-closed intake reason.
quality_debts.resolution: Set responsive_intake_decision.intake_allowed to false and hardened invalid fixture semantic checks so malformed digests and denied-intake reasons cannot allow intake.

quality_debts.summary: Three merged post-queue hardening slices shared the visible RTAQ-0049 ordinal.
quality_debts.resolution: Record bounded traceability: PR #133 was real submitted example artifact guard, PR #134 was builder digest boundary hardening, and PR #135 was submitted payload hash format guard; none authorizes pilot, evidence, or readiness upgrade.

quality_debts.summary: RTAQ-0011 state-sync tooling still reported stale pending/write-sync paths after rolling queue execution was retired.
quality_debts.resolution: Accept the current archive/retired/superseded control-state model without fabricating LEDGER-0021, and make the applier no-op cleanly in that state.

quality_debts.summary: Delayed review-window policy was not enough to prevent post-merge actionable review debt on PR #134.
quality_debts.resolution: Record the fast-merge/review-window incident as historical, resolve the actionable PR #134 fixture issue through QD-001, and validate this P1 quality-debt register in the existing Builder boundary check.
